positive: A harmonious, stylized graphic illustration of stacked mountains and stylized forest silhouettes, rendered in a mid-century modern art style. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical. The scene uses a sophisticated, limited color palette of sage green, terracotta orange, mustard yellow, and deep indigo. Focus on strong, clean geometric shapes and sharp contrast between the foreground elements and the sky. The overall aesthetic must be highly vector-graphic, suitable for screen printing or textile printing, featuring clean edges and flat washes of color. Minimalist, elevated, highly detailed silhouette work, graphic design perfect for apparel.
negative: photo-realistic, hyperdetailed, ugly, deformed, cropped, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, blur, noisy, grainy, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, multiple subjects
